Home About PhD GSoC

GSoC

Under the mentorship of Ravin Kumar and Junpeng Lao, I’m spending the summer of 2022 as a student at Google Summer of Code (GSoC). This page is intended to provide a series of blog posts from project management to technical implementations and examples in PyMC. The full description of the project can be read here. Wish me luck 😃


  • How to set PyMC environment locally

    June 9, 2022

    In the beginning, there was light, well, in my case, great mentors with a great plan. To achieve all the objectives, I had to make sure that I had everything installed correctly and that I understood how making contributions to PyMC works.


  • How to plan and track your tasks using GitHub

    June 2, 2022

    Who knew that project management can be done on GitHub too! Open source brings endless possibilities, and I started grasping it. Thank you, Ravin, for showing me and helping to organise the project in this way.
